visual_description: The audio is filled with a dramatic and suspenseful orchestral score. A close-up shot focuses on a man with short, dark hair, wearing a light-colored, button-down shirt. He has a serious and determined expression as he looks down and to his right. The background is out of focus, showing a dimly lit indoor space with other people blurred in the distance. In the top left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are visible. The music is characterized by a fast-paced, driving rhythm and a sense of urgency, creating a tense and action-packed atmosphere. The camera pulls back to a medium-long shot, revealing the man from behind. He is standing on a balcony or an upper-level landing of a building at night. He is looking out towards a window in the distance. The setting appears to be an older building with simple architecture. The white Chinese characters remain in the top left corner. The camera angle shifts slightly, still showing the man from behind as he stands on the landing. He turns his head slightly to the side, still looking out.
